semantics.evaluation: first-match-wins over `rules`, then `default`. '*' matches any value.

verdicts.allow+log: permitted; the executing tool MUST append a ledger line (JSONL: ts, corpus, provider, purpose, path, tool)
verdicts.conditional: permitted ONLY when the rule's `condition` holds; otherwise treat as deny
verdicts.pending-operator: evaluates as DENY. A named operator decision is required to flip this cell; flipping it is a one-line PR on this file

semantics.note: embedding, rerank, and vision-embedding send FULL content (text or images) to the provider — they are content egress, not metadata egress.

corpora.salus: any path under a `.salus`-marked root, or under a root listed in ~/.config/claude-glm/phi-roots or ~/.config/claude-glm/egress-denylist (the shared glm-guard.ts / parity_guard.py primitives)
corpora.luna-personal: the luna vault root EXCLUDING Clippings/ (journals, maps, sessions, notes)
corpora.handover-state: the handover state repo root (HANDOVER_DIR; work artifacts, specs, session notes). Kept for Mode-B EXTERNAL state repos after the HIMMEL-343 fold: a HANDOVER_DIR nested INSIDE a vault classifies as that vault's corpus instead (fence precedence checks vault roots first — more restrictive; pinned by test, HIMMEL-817)
corpora.himmel-code: himmel checkout(s), worktrees, and the public mirror (code + docs; public-propagated)

local-ollama.note: zero egress; includes qmd local GGUF embeddings

anthropic.note: the operating harness itself (Claude sessions natively read the vaults); recording status quo, not a widening

openai-codex.note: codex via hermes, paid usage bank

deepseek.note: DE-LISTED 2026-07-22 (HIMMEL-1257): dropped from vault + handover-state egress — bad extraction/enrichment results. Prior ratifications (2026-07-05, HIMMEL-343, HIMMEL-833) reversed; the cells below are explicit deny. himmel-code wildcard unaffected (public code).

alibaba.note: DE-LISTED 2026-07-22 (HIMMEL-1257): not pursuing the HIMMEL-765 pilot — bad results. Vault/handover cells demoted to explicit deny; himmel-code wildcard unaffected (public code).

rules.condition: per-run explicit opt-in flag (621/622 spec §4.1: even local salus extraction needs a per-run opt-in)
rules.why: PHI stays on-machine; opt-in prevents accidental bulk runs
PHI never leaves the machine. No override exists; no operator decision can be recorded here that flips this row
gemini de-listed; GEMINI/GOOGLE keys stay unset (621/622 P.7)

public-propagated code/docs; impl lanes (codex/GLM/alibaba) are ratified consumers. Caveat rides the lane guards: debrand content-not-name; secrets are excluded by block-read-secrets, not by this matrix
zero egress
operating substrate (sessions read/write handovers natively)

REVERSED 2026-07-22 (HIMMEL-1257): the 2026-07-09 HIMMEL-343 ratification (extend the 2026-07-05 DeepSeek luna override to the handover-state slice) is dropped — DeepSeek de-listed for bad results. Sanctioned set = GLM/Claude/Codex. Explicit deny keeps the reversal legible; not hard (a future operator decision could re-add).

rules.condition: brief-scoped: task briefs/excerpts through the guarded dispatch chokepoints only — never bulk corpus runs
rules.why: worker briefs necessarily carry handover-derived context; the chokepoint audit is the ledger

rules.condition: brief-scoped: task briefs/excerpts through the guarded dispatch chokepoints only — never bulk corpus runs
rules.why: same as openai-codex row

REVERSED 2026-07-22 (HIMMEL-1257): Alibaba de-listed (bad results). The brief-scoped worker cell goes with the rest — the remaining handover-state inference cells (openai-codex, zai-glm conditional + anthropic/ollama) are now exactly the sanctioned worker set {Codex, GLM} + substrate.
zero egress
operating substrate
REVERSED 2026-07-22 (HIMMEL-1257): DeepSeek de-listed (bad results). Was subsumed by the 2026-07-05 luna-personal override, which is itself reversed.

rules.condition: only if the 621/622 G2.3 local-quality ladder forces it AND the operator provisions ZAI_API_KEY for it (spec §4.2 exception; never mid-run)
rules.why: pre-existing narrow exception for clipped public content
NOT PURSUING the HIMMEL-765 pilot (2026-07-22, HIMMEL-1257): Alibaba de-listed — bad results. Was pending-operator (effective deny); now explicit deny.
NOT PURSUING HIMMEL-765 (2026-07-22, HIMMEL-1257): rerank sends query + candidate documents (content egress); Alibaba de-listed.
NOT PURSUING HIMMEL-765 (2026-07-22, HIMMEL-1257): clip images are content egress; Alibaba de-listed.
zero egress; the salus-grade fallback backend
operating substrate (Claude sessions read the vault natively every day)

REVERSED 2026-07-22 (HIMMEL-1257): the 2026-07-05 operator speed override (luna non-Clippings extraction on DeepSeek) is dropped — bad results. GLM (zai-glm) is the sanctioned CN extraction lane (see the zai-glm cell below). Explicit deny keeps the reversal legible; not hard.

operator ratification 2026-07-17 (HIMMEL-1122): luna non-Clippings graphify extraction on GLM, ledgered per run. WIDENS THE PERMITTED PROVIDER SET — full luna non-Clippings note bodies may now reach a second, additional vendor (Z.ai) that could not receive them before; the vendor count for this exposure goes 1 -> 2. Corpus, purpose, region (CN) and content scope are UNCHANGED from the 2026-07-05 DeepSeek cell above, so the KIND of exposure is the same even though the number of vendors holding it is not. Measured on an identical corpus 2026-07-17: glm-5.2 link-recall 63-79% vs deepseek 26%, file coverage 100% vs 95%, at flat-rate Coding-Plan cost vs $3.14 per full-vault deepseek run — i.e. the incumbent was strictly worse AND paid. NOT a default: refresh-graph-map.sh stays claude-cli (HIMMEL-1049 claude-only adopter story); GLM is opt-in per run.

REVERSED 2026-07-22 (HIMMEL-1257): the 2026-07-10 HIMMEL-833 chat-note enrichment ratification (full luna/chats/* bodies + top-200 tag vocabulary to DeepSeek) is dropped — DeepSeek de-listed for bad results. GLM enrichment (HIMMEL-1167, below) is the sanctioned lane. Explicit deny; not hard.

operator ratification 2026-07-17 (HIMMEL-1167): chat-note enrichment on GLM — full note bodies of luna/chats/* to Z.ai, plus the vault-wide top-200 tag vocabulary (tag names only) sent with each request as the allowed-tags list; exposure-identical in kind to the 2026-07-17 zai-glm EXTRACTION cell (HIMMEL-1122): same corpus, provider, CN region, and content scope — the vendor already holds this exposure class. Ledgered per run incl. vocab_tags; log obligation survives ratification, never plain allow

NOT PURSUING the HIMMEL-765 pilot (2026-07-22, HIMMEL-1257): Alibaba de-listed — bad results. This was THE contradiction cell from the Fable 2026-07-08 review (fence denied it, 765 needed it); resolved by dropping the pilot. Was pending-operator (effective deny); now explicit deny.
NOT PURSUING HIMMEL-765 (2026-07-22, HIMMEL-1257): same content-egress class as the embedding cell; Alibaba de-listed.
